case_title: ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC. VS LEE, JU HEE INDIV. & DBA FIRST FOOD MARKET

docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC. ASSIGNED TO RANDOLPH BUSH DBA ASSURED JUDGEMENT RECOVERY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,517.99 FILED BY ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JU HEE INDIV. & DBA FIRST FOOD MARKET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
